signals.headline: US, Iran Eye Fresh Talks Before 2-Week Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US, Iran Eye Fresh Talks Before 2-Week Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | HIGH confidence**  
No new ceasefire confirmation, announcement, or resolution has occurred today; the existing 2-week ceasefire was announced April 7 and is set to expire early next week, with both sides now discussing a second round of negotiations in Islamabad to potentially extend it[2][1].

signals.headline: Iran-US Peace Talks Fail: VP JD Vance Returns Empty-Handed from Pakistan-Facilitated Negotiations** | NO | HIGH confiden
signals.raw:
Iran-US Peace Talks Fail: VP JD Vance Returns Empty-Handed from Pakistan-Facilitated Negotiations** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2][6]

signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY (up from 2.00% in Feb)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]
